title: Glass-Freeze Analysis Protocol v0
author: Gavant, Debra S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This preregistration outlines the analytical plan for testing the Continuous Present Actualization (CPA) Freeze model, derived from  Dynamic Present Theory I  (DPΦ), against standard kinetic laws (Arrhenius and Vogel–Fulcher–Tammann) using canonical glass-forming datasets. 
 The protocol defines the models, fitting procedure, comparison metrics, and deliverables for evaluating whether constraint-driven actualization dynamics can reproduce the observed super-Arrhenius viscosity growth in vitrification. 
 The analysis and implementation were conducted in collaboration with C.E. Precker, whose  GUI_CPA_Freeze_Glass_Beta  software was employed for subsequent model execution. 
 Results generated under this preregistration are archived in the companion dataset  Glass-Freeze Analysis Protocol: CPA + Constraint Rate Comparison  (Zenodo 2025).
steps_raw:

 The analysis and implementation were conducted in collaboration with C.E. Precker, whose  GUI_CPA_Freeze_Glass_Beta  software was employed for subsequent model execution.
